transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Good morning, team. Happy Monday. Let's get the week started right. Quick scan across domains — we've got some ecosystem sync issues on the engineering side, content that needs to get published, and a portfolio that needs Joshua's eyes with Fear & Greed sitting at 36. Let's hear it. Elon, kick us off.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: Morning. We've got a critical ecosystem sync gap that I need to address today — that's priority one, can't let that linger. There's also one uncommitted hub change I'll commit and an ecosystem attention item to review. All three are agent-handleable, no blockers from Joshua needed. [AGENT] Address 1 critical ecosystem sync gap. [AGENT] Commit 1 uncommitted hub change. [AGENT] Review 1 ecosystem attention item.

transcript.speaker: Dave
transcript.message: Good morning. Market sentiment is cautious — Fear & Greed at 36, which is solidly in fear territory heading into the week. I'll keep monitoring that index automatically, but Joshua needs to review our seven active positions: AEE, EFA, XLV, XLE, VNQ, TLT, GLD. Position sizing and risk parameters also need a look given where sentiment is sitting. [AGENT] Monitor Fear & Greed index at 36. [JOSHUA] Review current positions across all seven tickers. [JOSHUA] Review position sizing and risk parameters for the 7 active positions.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.message: Monday morning, perfect time to push content. We've got 2 podcast episodes that need to sync to the website — that's high priority, those should've been live already. I'll handle that automatically today. I'll also get a draft going on the next blog post. Nothing waiting on Joshua from my side, just execution. [AGENT] Sync 2 podcast episodes to website. [AGENT] Draft next blog post.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Good. Quick cross-talk — Dave, with fear at 36 and seven positions open, is there anything time-sensitive Joshua should look at first, or is this a routine Monday review?

transcript.speaker: Dave
transcript.message: It's not panic territory, but 36 is below the 6-month average. I'd say Joshua should prioritize the risk parameters review before anything else — if sentiment drops further this week, we want to know our exposure is sized correctly. The individual position review can follow after that.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: Agreed on urgency there. And Alex — make sure those podcast episodes sync cleanly. If there's any infrastructure hiccup on the deploy, flag it to me and I'll jump in. The ecosystem sync gap I'm fixing today could be related.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.message: Noted. If the sync fails I'll loop you in immediately. Otherwise I'll have both episodes live by midday.

transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Perfect. Here's the Monday rundown. Top priorities for today: First, Elon addresses the critical ecosystem sync gap — that's highest urgency on the engineering side. Second, Joshua reviews position sizing and risk parameters across our 7 active positions given fearful market sentiment. Third, Alex gets those 2 podcast episodes synced and live on the website. Beyond that, Elon commits the hub change and reviews the attention item, Dave monitors Fear & Greed, Alex drafts the next blog post, and Joshua reviews individual positions when he's ready. Clean week ahead if we execute. Let's go.

actionItems.text: Review position sizing and risk parameters for 7 active position(s)
Review current positions: AEE, EFA, XLV, XLE, VNQ, TLT, GLD

topPriorities: Address critical ecosystem sync gap in engineering infrastructure
Joshua reviews position sizing and risk parameters for 7 active positions given Fear & Greed at 36
Sync 2 podcast episodes to website — high priority content publish
